title: CatVision (Legacy)
description: A minecraft mod which gives you Night Vision, even if you aren't a server operator. Inspired by CatEyes by Tee6! :)
body:
## *This mod has been rewritten for broader compatibility, visit it on https://modrinth.com/mod/catvision*. # CatVision (Legacy) A fabricmc minecraft mod which gives you Night Vision, even if you aren't a server operator. Inspired by CatEyes by Tee6! :) With this mod, you can give yourself night vision with the click of a button. The mod also has options to automatically enable night vision. And the best part: you don't need any permission, just use it anywhere! **DISCLAIMER: I AM NOT LIABLE IF YOU GET BANNED FOR CHEATING USING THIS, PLEASE FOLLOW THE RULES OF WHATEVER SERVER/REALM/MULTIPLAYER WORLD YOU ARE PLAYING ON WHEN USING THIS MOD!** ### Current Features (v1.4): - Smart Client Night Vision - Darkness/Blindness/Nausea Immunity ### Languages: - English - German - German (Austrian) ### Also available on: - [Curseforge](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/catvision-legacy)

This project is licensed under the **GNU Affero General Public License v3.0**. See the [LICENSE](https://github.com/MarioS271/cat_vision_mod/blob/main/LICENSE) file for details.
